spurious_features.label: negative statements or the absence of something
spurious_features.reason: Negation-pattern detector in hypothesis; spurious on this task.

spurious_features.label: words ending in 'thing' and 'one' often with preceding words indicating the presence of something
spurious_features.reason: Triggers on 'No one'; role is negation-pattern matching.

causal_features.label: the word "from"
causal_features.reason: Generic lexical match, but oracle says direct token reading only.

causal_features.label: the word "so," and also matches some words ending in "ware" and "such"
causal_features.reason: Generic lexical match; not semantic relation evidence.

causal_features.label: the phrasal verb "pick up" and variations
causal_features.reason: Captures meaningful phrasal-verb content, not negation.

other_features.label: the word "up"
other_features.reason: Pure word detector; no clear task alignment.

other_features.label: the word "about" when followed by a numerical value
the word "adequate" (and words that appear near it)
the word "one"
other_features.reason: Word detector; no causal semantic role claimed.

notes: Oracle explicitly says direct lexical matching dominates; only negation-pattern features are spurious.
